# SnappyWorks Gardening

> Professional gardening and outdoor maintenance services in Geelong, Victoria, Australia.

## Services

### Mowing
Regular mowing to keep your lawn looking pristine all year round.
Our professional lawn mowing service keeps your grass at the perfect height with clean edges and striped finishes. We handle lawns of all sizes across Geelong, from compact courtyards to sprawling properties.

### Weeding
Thorough weed removal to keep your garden beds healthy and tidy.
We remove weeds by the root, apply mulch, and maintain garden beds so your plants can thrive. Regular weeding prevents pest problems and keeps your outdoor areas looking their best.

### Edging
Crisp, clean edges along paths, driveways and garden beds.
Sharp edging transforms the look of your lawn and garden. We use professional line trimmers and edging tools to create clean, defined borders along paths, driveways, garden beds and fence lines.

### Pressure Cleaning
High-pressure cleaning for driveways, paths, patios and more.
Our professional pressure cleaning restores driveways, paths, patios, decks and exterior walls to like-new condition. We remove built-up grime, moss, mould and stains safely and efficiently.

### Hedge Trimming
Expert shaping and trimming to keep hedges neat and well-maintained.
From formal box hedges to native screening plants, we trim and shape your hedges for a clean, professional look. Regular trimming promotes thick, healthy growth and enhances your property's kerb appeal.

### Garden Tidy
Comprehensive garden care including pruning, tidying and seasonal clean-ups.
Our garden tidy service covers everything your outdoor space needs — pruning, deadheading, leaf removal, bed tidying and seasonal clean-ups. We create a custom plan tailored to your garden's unique needs.

### Mulching & Landscaping
Professional mulching, soil work and garden bed landscaping.
Transform your garden with fresh mulch, quality soil and professional bed preparation. Mulching suppresses weeds, retains moisture and gives your garden a polished finish.

### Rubbish Removal
Green waste and garden rubbish cleared and disposed of responsibly.
We handle all green waste and garden rubbish removal — from branches and clippings to old pots, broken pavers and general garden debris.

## Service Packages
- Essential: Regular lawn and garden upkeep (mowing, edging, weeding, green waste removal)
- Premium: Comprehensive care including hedging, mulching, seasonal pruning and priority scheduling
- Commercial: Tailored plans for businesses, body corporates and property managers

## Service Areas
Geelong CBD, Newtown, Highton, Belmont, Grovedale, Waurn Ponds, North Geelong, Norlane, Torquay, Lara, Corio, Leopold, Armstrong Creek, and Mount Duneed.

## About
Locally owned and operated gardening business serving Geelong since 2024. We offer reliable, quality gardening services for residential and commercial properties with fair, upfront pricing.

### Credentials
- Fully Insured (public liability)
- ABN Registered
- WorkSafe Compliant
- Eco-Friendly practices
- Licensed & Qualified
- Local & Independent

### Our Values
- Reliability: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and deliver consistent results.
- Quality: Professional equipment and proven techniques for the best possible result.
- Local Knowledge: Based in Geelong, we understand the local climate, soils and plant species.
- Fair Pricing: Honest, upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What areas do you service?
We service Geelong and surrounding suburbs including Newtown, Highton, Belmont, Grovedale, North Geelong, Norlane, Torquay, Lara, and more. Contact us to check if we cover your area.

### How do I get a quote?
You can request a free quote through our website, give us a call, or send us an email. We'll usually get back to you within 24 hours with a detailed, no-obligation quote.

### Do you offer regular maintenance plans?
Yes! We offer weekly, fortnightly and monthly maintenance plans tailored to your garden's needs. Regular clients enjoy priority booking and consistent pricing.

### Do I need to be home during the service?
Not at all. As long as we have access to the areas that need work, we can complete the job while you're out. We'll send you a message when we're done.

### What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?
If the weather prevents us from completing the job safely and to our usual standard, we'll reschedule at the earliest convenient time — no extra charge.

### Are you insured?
Yes, we carry full public liability insurance for your peace of mind. We can provide a certificate of currency upon request.

## Customer Testimonials

"SnappyWorks transformed our backyard from an overgrown mess into a beautiful space we actually enjoy spending time in. Professional, punctual, and the results speak for themselves." — Sarah M., Newtown, Geelong

"We've been using SnappyWorks for regular lawn mowing and hedge trimming for over a year now. Always reliable, always a great result. Highly recommend!" — James T., Belmont, Geelong

"The pressure cleaning on our driveway was incredible — it looks brand new. The team was friendly and finished faster than expected. Will definitely book again." — Linda K., Highton, Geelong

"Great communication from start to finish. They gave us an honest quote and delivered exactly what they promised. Our garden has never looked better." — Mark D., North Geelong

"Had the whole front yard mulched and edged — looks absolutely fantastic. The team was quick, tidy and left everything spotless." — Angela C., Waurn Ponds, Geelong

"Best gardening team in Geelong, hands down. They're always on time, do a brilliant job on our hedges and leave the yard cleaner than they found it." — Karen P., Leopold
